# Generated by build_lesson_vocabulary.py

# Phrases (full lines)
What is your name?
My name is Rahul.
What about you.
I am Sumi.
Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too.
Where do you live?
I live in Dhaka. আমি ঢাকায় থাকি।
What do you do?
